entities.name: Block Registry
entities.context: System for loading and managing canonical block definitions

entities.name: canonical_blocks.yaml
entities.context: Configuration file defining block types, detection rules, and generation priorities

entities.name: Semantic Analysis
entities.context: AI-driven technique for analyzing transcript content to identify themes and meeting types

entities.name: manifest generation
entities.context: Process for generating meeting manifests from transcripts

entities.name: conditional blocks
entities.context: Block types triggered by specific semantic patterns rather than always generated

entities.name: detection_guidance
entities.context: Semantic triggers, contextual scenarios, and examples for identifying block types

entities.name: core blocks
entities.context: Blocks marked always_generate:true that are included in every manifest

relationships.context: N5 system uses Block Registry to load canonical block definitions
N5 reads block definitions from this configuration file
Manifest generation process loads block definitions from registry
Manifest generation uses semantic analysis to process transcripts
Semantic analysis applies detection_guidance to identify conditional blocks
Conditional blocks are identified through their detection_guidance rules
Core blocks are always included in manifest generation output
